testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All tests were pre-written and passing upon implementation completion.

criteria.criterion: GET /api/agents/:slug/pickup?project=koda returns { ret: 0, data: { ticket, matchScore, matchedCapabilities } } for a matching agent with candidates
Response data is null (ret still 0) when no VERIFIED unassigned tickets exist in the project
Only VERIFIED tickets with both assignedToAgentId=null and assignedToUserId=null are considered candidates
Ties in score are broken by priority order: CRITICAL > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW
Returns 404 AppException if agent slug is not found
Returns 400 AppException if project query param is missing
Endpoint is decorated with Swagger @ApiOperation, @ApiQuery, @ApiResponse decorators
Unit tests cover happy path, no-match null, unknown agent 404, and score-0 priority fallback
Supertest E2E test covers the pickup endpoint
bun run test passes in apps/api

reasoning: Implementation is complete and correct. All 166 tests pass (48 service + 46 controller + 72 E2E). The suggestTicket() method correctly loads agents with capabilities, filters VERIFIED unassigned tickets, scores by capability/label match, and sorts by score then priority. The controller endpoint validates the project query parameter and properly delegates to the service. All Swagger decorators are in place. No code quality issues detected.
